title: fapdos' Nether Mobs: Recrafted
description: Adds several different mobs and items to the Nether
body:
Have any suggestion? Want to report a bug? We have a Discord server! You can join and ask anything you want!


Introduction

This mod aims to add several different mobs into the Minecraft Nether! The mobs added by this mod all have some sort of gimmick to them, so they feel more unique. Apart from mobs, this mod adds a few new items aswell, and everything there is to know is listed below.

 

This mod is for Forge and there will never be a Fabric port.

 

List of mobs & information about them

 

Ghostly Zombie

HP: 20

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Soul Sand Valley

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Rotten flesh & Lost soul

Special information: They float around and are transparent. When they hit you, you receive nausea.

 

Ghostly Creeper

HP: 20

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Nether Wastes

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Gunpowder & Lost soul

Special information: They harass you instead of hurting you. When they die, they blow up, but if you're wearing anything made of gold or if you use a golden sword to kill it, it won't blow up.

 

Blackstone Creation

HP: 25

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Basalt Deltas

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Blackstone

Special information: When they hurt you, they blind you.

 

Skeletal Chicken

HP: 4

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: All Nether biomes

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Bones

Special information: (None)

 

Skeletal Cow

HP: 10

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: All Nether biomes

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Bones

Special information: (None)

 

Skeletal Pig

HP: 10

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: All Nether biomes

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Bones

Special information: (None)

 

Skeletal Spider

HP: 16

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: All Nether biomes

Attack damage: 2

Drops: Wither bones

Special information: They behave exactly like a Vanilla spider, but they also give you the Wither effect when hurting you. Their natural enemy is the Tanglarp.

 

Warped Monstrosity

HP: 25

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Warped Forest

Attack damage: 5

Drops: Warped Nylium

Special information: When they find you, they'll hold you and will start attacking you while they hold you. After escaping from their grasp, they will attack you melee. They also have a higher knockback resistance than other mobs. When you feed them a Scorching Berry, they will become passive towards you until you attack them again.

 

Crimine

HP: 10

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Crimson Forest

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Scorching berry

Special information: You can tame them with scorching berries.

 

Pixern

HP: 13

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Soul Sand Valley

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Soul lantern & Lost soul

Special information: They float around and glow in the dark. When you right-click them while wearing any kind of boot, they will enchant your boots with Lava Walker, which is a new enchantment that lets you walk on lava.

 

Tanglarp

HP: 10

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Warped Forest

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Twisting vines

Special information: They attack skeletal spiders when they see them. They are naturally passive towards players, but when you hit them, they will attack you back.

 

Fungan

HP: 15

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Crimson Forest

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Crimson fungus

Special information: When you attack them, there's a random chance for them to give you the following effects: levitation, mining fatigue, slowness & weakness.

 

Basalt Slug

HP: 23

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Basalt Deltas

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Polished basalt & Magma cream

Special information: At first, you have to break its shell, which makes you obtain polished basalt, but after that, you can kill the slug itself, and it'll drop magma cream.

 

Flamus

HP: 25

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Nether Wastes

Attack damage: 4

Drops: Leather

Special information: It lets you ride it with no extra conditions, but it'll attack you if you hurt it.

 

Magma Lizard

HP: 7

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Nether Wastes

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Fire charge

Special information: They're shy. They try to walk away from players. When right-clicked with a lava bucket, it can be put inside the bucket. When you put it back from the bucket, it'll give you fire resistance. They're also damaged by touching water.

 

Living Soul Flame

(Designed by CrepikCZ)

HP: 10

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Soul sand valley

Attack damage: 0

Drops: Free soul

Special information: They're damaged by water. When right-clicked with a Soul Fungus, they'll give you Speed I and also make you stop burning if you are while feeding them the Soul Fungus.

 

Mutre

HP: 10

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Inside Nether Mud blobs

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Nether mud

Special information: They poison you when they hurt you. They can be found inside blobs of Nether Mud, instead of spawning in specific biomes by themselves.

 

Wildfire

HP: 55

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Each Blaze that spawns in the Nether has a 10% chance of becoming a Wildfire.

Attack damage: 7

Drops: Blaze rod (3 of them)

Special information: They behave just like blazes, except that they can run on land and they have shields around them that protect them from attacks. To kill it, you need to break its shields first.

 

Peetry

HP: 20

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Basalt Deltas & Soul Sand Valley

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Petrified Twig

Special information: It doesn't move. It stays in place all the time. When it gets hurt for the first time, it spawns 14 Shadowy Wisps that will attack you.

 

Yongire

HP: 30

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Warped Forest & Crimson Forest

Attack damage: 6

Drops: Yongire Scale (Only adult ones)

Special information: It's the natural enemy of Skrey. They fly around. When it attacks you, it gives you Nausea and Blindness for 7 seconds. It can produce an egg when given Tail Protuberance.

 

Skrey

HP: 25

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Warped Forest & Nether Wastes

Attack damage: 5

Drops: Tail Protuberance (Only adult ones)

Special information: It's the natural enemy of Yongire. They fly around. It won't hurt you unless you hurt it first. When you find a baby Skrey, you can pick it up and take it as your own pet. Baby ones can't fly around.

 

Soul Leech

HP: 20

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Basalt Deltas & Soul Sand Valley

Attack damage: 5

Drops: Fermented Spider Eye (50%) & Gunpowder (100%)

Special information: When you get near it, it will attach itself to your face. If you sneak (pressing SHIFT) while having it on your face, it will simply come off. It only attaches itself to your face when its HP is above half.

 

Lava Angel

HP: 15

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Alongside Striders.

Attack damage: 5

Drops: Fiery Soul

Special information: It's a basic floating melee creature, but it drops an item called ''Fiery Soul'', which can be used to craft a new set of blocks: Wither Spreader Block, Poison Spreader Block & Burning Spreader Block. These are blocks crafted with fiery souls, free souls, and whatever relevant items around them. These blocks will give their respective effects (wither, poison, burning) to enemies around. This creature is naturally aggressive towards Morterium.

 

Floating Wither Skull

HP: 10

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Any Nether biome

Attack damage: 3

Drops: Wither Bone

Special information: Floating entity. Gives you Wither II for 9 seconds when hurting you.

 

Ironshell Snail

HP: 30

Aggression: Passive

Spawning: Any Nether biome

Attack damage: 1

Drops: Raw Iron

Special information: This is a completely passive creature. It deals thorns damage.

 

Quartz Walker

HP: 23

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Nether Wastes, Soul Sand Valley, Crimson Forest & Warped Forest

Attack damage: 5

Drops: Quartz

Special information: It starts attacking you if you attack it first. When you give it Quartz, it will give you EXP in exchange. The EXP it gives ranges from 2 to 14.

 

Splitter

HP: 15 (Full Body form) / 5 (Split form) - (Total of 25 HP)

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Nether Wastes, Basalt Deltas & Crimson Forest

Attack damage: 6 (Full Body form) / 5 (Split form)

Drops: Nether Brick (Split forms only) & Free Soul (20% chance whenever it gets split)

Special information: It spawns in its Full Body form. When it gets to 1HP or less, it will split into two halves. Each half is a separate entity, so you'll face against two instead of one. They are faster than most other mobs. This creature is immune to fire in all its forms.

 

Magmatic Piglin

HP: 17

Aggression: Hostile

Spawning: Any Nether biome

Attack damage: 8

Drops: Gold Ingot

Special information: They are Piglins that can survive in lava and fire. They are always hostile towards players. They also have a 50% chance of setting whoever they hit on fire for 9 seconds.

 

Morterium

HP: 40

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Soul Sand Valley

Attack damage: 7

Drops: Free Soul

Special information: This is a creature that will defend you from whoever you hit and gives you Resistance I & Strength I during night time. This creature is tamed with Fiery Souls. They are aggressive towards Lava Angels. If a player hits them when untamed, they will disappear and give the player Blindness and Wither II for 8 seconds. You can put it inside a glass bottle if it's tamed by you.

 

Runiza

HP: 30

Aggression: Neutral

Spawning: Crimson Forest

Attack damage: 6

Drops: Nothing

Special information: It panics around when attacked and then starts attacking you. It places fire on its path when it has 6HP or less.

 

Items

Wither Bone

It is obtained from killing Wither Skeletons, Skeletal Spiders or Floating Wither Skulls. You can convert flowers into wither roses when right-clicking them with this item. You can also craft a toolset with this item mixed with amethyst shards. This toolset works like iron, but can also give the Wither effect to enemies. It can also be used for crafting Wither Spreader Blocks.

 

Scorching Berry

You can find scorching berries in Crimson Forests and Nether Wastes. You can use it for taming crimines, and you can also eat it yourself. When you right-click on the floor with a scorching berry, you can plant it. You can also craft a scorching soup with this item.

 

Lost Soul

It is obtained from killing any of the following mobs: Allay, Phantom, Ghast, Pixern, Living Soul Flame, Ghostly Creeper & Ghostly Zombie.

It is used for crafting transparent brick blocks, which are just decorations. It's also used for crafting a Petrified Wand. Lost souls are also used for brewing levitation potions.

 

Soul Fungus

They spawn naturally in the Soul Sand Valley biome. They're used for feeding Living Soul Flames. They can only be placed on soul sand and on soul soil.

 

Nether Mud

It's a purely decorative block that can be found in blob formations around the Nether. Inside of the blobs, 2 Mutre can be found.

 

Petrified Twig & Petrified Wand

The Petrified Twig is an item dropped by Peetry. It can be crafted into a Petrified Wand. The Petrified Wand is a weapon that is used for summoning little Shadowy Wisps that will help you in combat.

 

Tail Protuberance

This is an item dropped by adult Skrey. This item is used for making adult Yongire produce an egg.

 

Yongire Scale

This is an item dropped by adult Yongire. It is used for brewing potions of nausea.

 

Fiery Soul

Dropped by Lava Angel.  It's used for crafting Spreader Blocks and Soul Mask. It can also be used for taming Morterium.

 

Spreader Blocks

These blocks will spread potion effects around that only affect enemies. The only Spreader Blocks that are getting added are for Wither, Poison and Burning. These blocks are crafted with Fiery Souls, dropped by Lava Angels.

 

Soul Mask

Makes you have a 40% chance of getting free souls from any mob you kill while wearing the mask. It's crafted with 2 free souls, 1 fiery soul and 2 strings.

 

Quartz Blade

It's a weapon that deals extra damage to creatures in the Nether. This also brings a new enchantment, "Infernal Slayer".
